User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the FinPilot application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Access is restricted to the user with the matching userId.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to ensure Authorization Independence, DBAC, and QAPs. User data is stored under `/users/{userId}` to establish clear ownership. This path-based ownership ensures private data is only accessible to the authenticated user.  The structure is highly secure and makes ownership-based security rules simple and efficient. Because the application does not describe collaborative documents this is the only model used.
